marketplaces.name: official
marketplaces.comment: Official Anthropic-managed plugin directory. Contains mcp-server-dev, agent-decomposition, etc.

install.name: pr-activity
install.comment: Subscribes the in-session orchestrator to GitHub PR webhook events (comments, CI, reviews). Pairs with .github/workflows/claude.yml (the CI-side responder).

install.name: claude-code-action
install.comment: Canonical Claude Code GitHub Action. Auto-reviews every PR (claude-code-review.yml) and responds to @claude mentions (claude.yml). The in-CI half of the two-surface dispatch model: in-session heartbeat (.claude/skills/heartbeat.md) + in-CI claude-code-action. Both consume PR-activity events; the heartbeat dispatches by posting @claude comments; the action executes on the head SHA. Added by operator via PR #17 (add-claude-github-actions-* setup wizard).

install.name: code-review
install.comment: The code-review plugin from anthropics/claude-code-plugins, loaded by claude-code-review.yml via plugin_marketplaces + plugins inputs. Operationalizes 'remove operator from PR-review HITL' (operator-2026-05-10-autonomy.md): Claude is the automated reviewer.

install.name: typescript-lsp
install.comment: TypeScript language server exposed via MCP for code-intelligence (go-to-definition, find-references, hover) inside agent sessions. Materialized by scripts/install-plugins.ts (Phase 7); PR 4 declares the manifest only.

install.name: mcp-server-dev
install.comment: Interactive walkthrough for building MCP servers — referenced by vendor/anthropics/claude.com/docs/connectors/building.md. Materialized in Phase 7 / 12 (bridge-as-Connector).

install.name: agent-decomposition
install.comment: The cwc-workshops/agent-decomposition pattern — canonical worked example for decomposing a large-prompt agent into skills + code execution + callable_agents. Referenced in docs/architecture.md long-arc section.

install.name: code-simplifier
install.comment: Code simplification + refactor heuristics. Operator-named 2026-05-22 for the PR-loop refactor passes (OBLOG.fidelity, PR #174 refactor). Project-scoped to keep version-controlled.

install.name: pr-review-toolkit
install.comment: PR review automation toolkit. Complements code-review; provides full review workflow for the autonomous PR-loop (task #36).

install.name: commit-commands
install.comment: Conventional-commit helpers. Pairs with docs/CONVENTIONS.md (every commit ends with (O<TAG>)). Project-scoped so the rule travels with the repo.

install.name: feature-dev
install.comment: Feature-development workflow. Used when authoring new src/ surfaces (e.g. blog-extract-fidelity.test.ts in OBLOG.eval).

install.name: github
install.comment: GitHub MCP plugin. Provides real-time PR/issue webhook events to the orchestrator beyond gh CLI polling. Required for W2 (monitoring layer, task #38).

install.name: plugin-dev
install.comment: Plugin authoring scaffolding. Required for W3 (subagentceo/knowledge-work-plugins marketplace fork, task #39) to ensure new plugins conform to .claude-plugin/plugin.json schema.

install.name: mcp-server-dev
install.comment: MCP server authoring walkthrough. Required for any new MCP server we build with cited grounding (vendor/anthropics/claude.com/docs/connectors/building.md).

install.name: skill-creator
install.comment: Skill authoring + evaluation. Required when extending .claude/skills/ (heartbeat, refresh-vendors, routines, schedule-bridge).

install.name: session-report
install.comment: Dumps session state on rotation. Pairs with the session-rotation contract in .claude/templates/pr-task.md.

notes.phase-7-completion: scripts/install-plugins.ts in Phase 7 materializes each install entry into .claude/plugins/<name>/ by shallow-cloning the marketplace subtree via GitHub MCP get_file_contents. Until then this manifest is the source-of-truth for operator + reviewer audit.
notes.boris-cherny-pattern: The marketplaces+manifest model is the publicly-documented Anthropic pattern: a lead orchestration agent enumerates available plugins via the marketplace, installs the ones its rubric requires, and the rest stay dormant. See docs/architecture.md#long-arc-workers-goal.
